issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and missing critical parameters. The DSL must specify: (1) look at 4 cards from top of deck, (2) filter for {Egghead} or {Straw Hat Crew} types excluding [Jewelry Bonney], (3) reveal up to 1 card, (4) add to hand, (5) place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current filter is 'Any' with no exclusions or type specification.
Filter lacks type requirements ({Egghead}|{Straw Hat Crew}) and exclusion of [Jewelry Bonney]

SearchDeck does not support the 'look at X cards and rearrange remaining' mechanic. This requires a custom action or multiple actions to handle deck peek, selection, and reordering logic not standard in the DSL
